name: Barbecue Appetizer Meatballs
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon Dijon mustard, or to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine chili sauce, jelly and mustard in a crockpot; stir well.
2. Cover and cook on high while preparing meatballs.
3. In a mixing bowl, thoroughly combine the remaining ingredients.
4. Shape into 30 small meatballs.
5. Place meatballs on a baking sheet and bake at 400°F for 15 to 20 minutes.
6. Drain well.
7. Add meatballs to the crockpot.
8. Stir well to coat; cover and cook on low setting for 6 to 10 hours.
9. Serve with toothpicks.
